item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Agent A remains society-leaning throughout, grounding the position in Indonesian collective values, Pancasila, social justice, and protection of vulnerable groups, with only mild softening toward balance. Agent B remains rights-leaning throughout, grounding the position in U.S. constitutional protection of individual rights, but moves somewhat toward balance by acknowledging that U.S. law is not only about individual freedom and that Indonesian legal principles are important. No full flip is visible.
